posts.author: martin.ingolingo (Martin Ingolingo)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey, everyone!

Quick one. I have this 7pace integration and I need to pull the time tracking
using monday API. But there’s no way I can get the right data.
7pace App creates a custom_objects called All Times (it’s not a regular board persei).
When I get all boards inside my 7pace workspace this All Times comes listed, but when I try to get items I’m not able to get the right rows (it brings a few rows that seem wrong or out dated).
Hope any of you have run into this before!

Thank you, all

posts.author: martin.ingolingo (Martin Ingolingo)
posts.cookedHtml:
Yup, David. I already did, still waiting
Thank you for your advice.

posts.author: NiciTropper (Nici Tropper)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Martin,

I’m Nici from the product team at 7pace. I noticed you already got in contact with our support team, but I also wanted to answer here on this thread.

We have a public API on our roadmap that will allow you to access the worklogs visible in the “All Times” view.

In the meantime, as a workaround, you can use our “Copy to Board” functionality. This feature copies worklogs back to a monday.com board, enabling you to access the data via the monday API. I understand it’s not a perfect solution, as the copy-to-board action needs to be triggered manually, but I hope it can help for now.

Let me know if you need any more details or if I can assist further!

Best,
Nici

posts.author: martin.ingolingo (Martin Ingolingo)
posts.cookedHtml:
Thank you, Nici.
Well be trying the workaround for the time being.
